root_cause: bookworm main repository lacks non-free-firmware in effective chroot apt sources
observed_chroot_sources_list: deb http://security.debian.org/ bookworm-security main contrib non-free-firmware
apt_errors: E: Unable to locate package firmware-iwlwifi
E: Unable to locate package firmware-intel-sound
contributing_causes: unquoted --archive-areas in auto/config (shell passes only main to lb config)
missing explicit config/archives/debian.list.chroot parent mirror lines
stale chroot/etc/apt/sources.list from prior main-only build
